facts.fact: Army Service Forces managed food, fuel, ammunition, transport, medical care, and repair.
facts.note: The combat unit depends on a broader sustainment machine.

facts.fact: Ordnance handled a massive procurement and maintenance burden.
facts.note: Vehicle readiness is a logistics outcome.

facts.fact: The official Army history series includes logistics and technical-service volumes.
facts.note: Provides a route into deeper sustainment history.
